_notes.history: rank=20 selected in all 10 folds — the inner CV was hitting the lower bound of the previous grid [20,50,100]. Grid now extended down to [5,10,20,30] to find the true optimum. DKN-Align lr=0.001 dominant. DKN-AGOP still below SVC-RBF even after tuning — this is the hardest dataset for our models.
_notes.time_budget: moderate n — n_iter=20 gives good coverage without excess runtime

DKN-AGOP._comment_rank: rank=20 was the lower bound of the previous grid and won every fold. Extended down to 5 — the true optimum may be even sparser.

DKN-Align._comment_lr: lr=0.001 selected in all 10 folds previously — kept fixed, only n_layers, C, D explored.
